name: DUODENAL VARICES
definition: dilated collateral veins ← portal hypertension (posterior superior pancreaticoduodenal vein)
dominant_finding: commonly associated with fundal + esophageal varices
discriminating_features: lobulated filling defects (best demonstrated in prone position, maximal luminal distension
commonly associated with fundal + esophageal varices
